topic: Life cycles in plants and animals

buckets.description: Questions testing the conditions for seed germination, the role of seed parts during growth, and the design of fair experiments to investigate these factors.
Questions requiring the identification, sequencing, and comparison of the stages in various animal life cycles, including their distinct characteristics.
Questions focusing on the life cycle of a flowering plant after germination, including the functions of flowers, fruits, and the processes of reproduction.
Questions involving the interpretation of data or scenarios to analyze how environmental factors and ecological interactions influence animal life cycles.
